logs.heading: A0: Loading gchat skill

kvps.reasoning:
The user wants me to:
1. Load the "gchat" skill using skills_tool
2. Follow its instructions (it will read Google Chat from a remote Chrome DevTools instance)
3. Wait for it to complete (5-15 minutes)
4. On completion, load notify-user skill and send a notification
5. On failure, load notify-user and send error summary with priority 4
